name: Switch Without Default
description: Switch statements should have a default clause for defensive programming. Missing defaults can lead to unhandled cases and silent bugs.
rationale: The requirement for a final default clause is defensive programming. The clause should either take appropriate action, or contain a suitable comment as to why no action is taken.
compliant_code:
switch tag {
case 0, 1, 2, 3:
    foo()
case 4, 5, 6, 7:
    bar()
default:
    qix()
}
